title: Multipurpose Storage Caddy, Multipurpose Caddy Organizer, Stackable OrganizerCaddy, Plastic Desk OrganiserCaddy with Handle for Office,Bathroom, Crafts, or School Supplies (White)
features: High Quality Materials: This multipurpose storage caddy made from high-quality plastic,which is BPA-free, non-toxic, built to last and not easy to deformation. Caddy organiser is easy to clean, just wash with water and soap and dry dry.

Divided Design: The art organizer designed with 5 compartments.Different items can be stored in different compartments,the middle divider is removable, allowing you to merge two compartments into one larger space, to make room for different sized items.This flexibility ensures it can accommodate both small and larger items efficiently.
Stackable Design:This storage caddy has a groove at the bottom that can be stacked and inserted to save space. And the stackable design lets you maximize your storage potential.

Easy to Carry: This portable stackable desk caddy features a carrying handle so it can be moved to exactly where it is needed. The size of stackable organizer caddy is 24.6×15.3×11.3cm,with a compact structure that is easy to carry.

Multifunctional: Plastic desk organiser caddy with handle is suitable for different areas, such as bedrooms, study rooms, offices, bathrooms, kitchen,handicraft areas, tool rooms, etc. Also suitable for storing different items,such as cosmetics,shudy/office supplies, art supplies, cleaning products, tools, crafts, coloured pencils and much more.
description: Features: - Stackable desk organiser with compartments is compact, portable and versatile. - The bottom of the desk caddy is equipped with four drainage holes, allowing for quick water drainage and ensuring your items stay dry and hygienic. - Stackable organizer caddy allows you to maximize your storage space while keeping everything easily accessible. - Equipped with a sturdy handle, this storage caddy is easy to carry from room to room. Specification: Material: Plastic Size:24.6×15.3×11.3cm Color:White Package Include: 1×Multipurpose Caddy Organizer
